---
title: "Changelog (CMS staging)"
cmsStaging: true
---


<Update label="v0.26.2" description="June 25, 2026">

**Partner Node Updates**
* [**SeeDance 2.0 Mini**](https://links.comfy.org/4eOUnjJ): Added ByteDance SeeDance 2.0 Mini on Text-to-Video, First-Last-Frame, and Reference nodes

</Update>

<Update label="v0.26.1" description="June 24, 2026">

**Partner Node Updates**
* [**SeeDance 2.0**](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/pull/14614): Added 4K resolution support for ByteDance SeeDance 2.0
* [**HappyHorse 1.1**](https://links.comfy.org/3SoBFYI): Added support for Alibaba's HappyHorse 1.1 model
* [**Grok Video**](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/pull/14612): Added 1080p support for Grok video generation

</Update>

<Update label="v0.26.0" description="June 23, 2026">

**New Open-Source Model Support**
* [**Krea2**](https://links.comfy.org/4eC8714): Krea's open-source image model with wide aesthetic and stylistic range
* [**Boogu-Image**](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/pull/14523): Text-to-image with Qwen3-VL-8B encoder and image editing
* [**Qwen3-VL Text Generation**](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/pull/14298): Image-aware text generation with 4B and 8B models
* [**SCAIL-2 Multireference**](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/pull/14509): Multi-reference SCAIL-2 character replacement

**New Node Updates**
* [**LTX2 Context Windows**](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/pull/13325): Context window sampling for LTX-2 video+audio with IC-LoRA splicing
* [**Save Nodes Output Socket**](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/pull/13866): Output socket on save nodes for downstream wiring

**Partner Node Updates**
* [**Luma Rays 3.2**](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/pull/14540): Seven nodes for Luma Ray 3.2 video generation

</Update>

<Update label="v0.25.1" description="June 16, 2026">

**Partner Node Updates**
* [**Kling V3-Turbo**](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/pull/14528): Text-to-video generation model

</Update>

<Update label="v0.25.0" description="June 16, 2026">

**New Open-Source Model Support**
* [**Depth Anything 3**](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/pull/13853): Monocular depth estimation model
* [**SCAIL-2**](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/pull/14373): Character replacement model for video editing
* [**Bernini-R**](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/pull/14216): Wan video model support

**Partner Node Updates**
* [**Gemini Text Node**](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/pull/14299): LLM partner node
* [**Runway Aleph2**](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/pull/14306): Video generation node

</Update>

<Update label="v0.24.1" description="June 3, 2026">

**Partner Node Updates**
* **Bria Green Background**: Image green background removal node.
* **Bria Transparent Video Background**: Video background removal with alpha channel output.
* **Krea 2 Medium Turbo**: Faster medium-sized image generation model.
* **Seed input to Flux Erase node**: Adds seed parameter for repeatable erasure results.

</Update>

<Update label="v0.23.0" description="June 1, 2026">

New Open-Source Model Support
* [**Microsoft Lens**](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/pull/14077): Text-to-image model with GPT-OSS-20B encoder
* [**NVIDIA PixelDiT & PiD**](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/pull/14103): Text-to-image models including PixelDiT 1300M and PiD family
* [**TripoSplat**](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/pull/14210): Image-to-3D Gaussian splat model
* [**MediaPipe Face Detection**](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/pull/14009): Dependency-free face detection and landmarker

Partner Node Updates
* **OpenRouter LLM Node**: Partner node for OpenRouter language model API

</Update>

<Update label="v0.22.2" description="May 20, 2026">

**Partner Node Updates**
* **Rodin2.5**: Quality mesh generation node
* **Rodin2.5**: Fixed seed parameter handling

</Update>

<Update label="v0.22.1" description="May 20, 2026">

* **OpenRouter LLM node**: New partner node for OpenRouter API access.
* **Anthropic node**: Added reasoning widget for step-by-step thought display.
* **ByteDance2Reference node**: Added automatic upscaling widget for video outputs.
* **Grok LLM**: Fixed issue passing images to the model.

</Update>
